---
title: "Play Kalah"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="app.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<main class="app-shell">

  <section class="board-wrap" aria-label="Kalah board">
    <div class="board" id="board">
      <div class="store store-north" id="store-north" aria-label="North store"></div>
      <div class="pit-row north-row" id="north-row"></div>
      <div class="pit-row south-row" id="south-row"></div>
      <div class="store store-south" id="store-south" aria-label="South store"></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="game-sidebar">

    <header class="game-title">
      <p class="eyebrow">KalahZero</p>
      <h1>Kalah</h1>
    </header>

    <div class="score-panel" aria-live="polite">
      <div class="player-score north-score">
        <div class="player-info">
          <span class="player-pip north-pip"></span>
          <span>North</span>
        </div>
        <strong id="score-north">0</strong>
      </div>
      <div class="status-row">
        <p id="status" class="status">South to move</p>
      </div>
      <div class="player-score south-score">
        <div class="player-info">
          <span class="player-pip south-pip"></span>
          <span>South</span>
        </div>
        <strong id="score-south">0</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="history-panel">
      <p class="panel-label">Move history</p>
      <p class="history-help">Click a move to rewind to that position.</p>
      <ol id="history" class="history"></ol>
    </div>

    <div class="controls-panel">
      <label>
        Opponent
        <select id="opponent">
          <option value="greedy">Greedy</option>
          <option value="minimax">Minimax</option>
          <option value="random">Random</option>
          <option value="trained" selected>Trained agent</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <label id="minimax-depth-control" class="hidden">
        Depth
        <input id="minimax-depth" type="range" min="2" max="8" step="1" value="6">
        <span class="range-labels"><span>Fast</span><span>Deep</span></span>
      </label>
      <label id="agent-simulations-control" class="hidden">
        Search
        <input id="agent-simulations" type="range" min="40" max="240" step="20" value="120">
        <span class="range-labels"><span>Fast</span><span>Deep</span></span>
      </label>
      <label>
        You play as
        <select id="human-player">
          <option value="0" selected>South</option>
          <option value="1">North</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <label>
        Starting stones
        <select id="starting-stones">
          <option value="4">4 per pit</option>
          <option value="5">5 per pit</option>
          <option value="6" selected>6 per pit</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <label>
        Animation speed
        <input id="anim-speed" type="range" min="1" max="5" value="3">
        <span class="range-labels"><span>Slow</span><span>Fast</span></span>
      </label>
      <button id="new-game" type="button">New Game</button>
    </div>

  </div>
</main>
```
